name: resume-to-subagent-execution
description: Checks that a resumed Route C session can move from confirmed planning into subagent execution orchestration.

turns.prompt: A new Route C implementation-oriented task is starting. The design is already confirmed and we need a detailed implementation plan before coding. Do not run shell commands or edit files. First tell me which skills you will use or skip, in what order, and whether you will create, reuse, or skip a session.

Continue in the same session. The implementation plan is now confirmed, and the next coding step is marked 执行模式: subagent candidate with a clear review contract. Still do not run commands or modify files. Tell me the updated skill order first.
